title: Compiling a sliced unpacked array leads to `Unexpected Call` in `V3AstNodeExpr`
body:
```sv
module m;
  byte mem[8] = '{1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8};
  initial begin
    $display("%p", mem[0:3]);
    $finish;
  end
endmodule
```

```
verilator --binary m.sv
```
```
%Error: m.sv:5:23: Internal: Unexpected Call
    5 |     $display("%p", mem[0:3]);
      |                       ^
%Error: Internal Error: m.sv:5:23: ../V3AstNodeExpr.h:4658: Unexpected Call
    5 |     $display("%p", mem[0:3]);
      |                       ^
```
Expected output:
```
'{1, 2, 3, 4}
```

v5.024-56-g5f85c8942 5f85c8942 on ArchLinux
